name: Ventia Services Group Limited
analysis: VNT's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 1% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$6.4200. Trade idea: entry A$6.5900, stop A$6.0885, target A$8.0945 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
